title: lithospermum boreale
intro: Lithospermum boreale, also known as Puccoon or Northern Gromwell, is a perennial herb native to the boreal regions of North America and Europe. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Lithospermum boreale include reducing inflammation and pain, treating skin conditions such as eczema and acne, and supporting the immune system. Lithospermum boreale can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and has also been used in salves and creams to topically apply its medicinal properties.
